mnemonics.title: OLS Recall
mnemonics.content: Ordinary Least Squares: Optimize Line Simply (minimize sum of squared residuals)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine an S-shaped curve flattening at 0 and 1, like a stretched 'S' between two horizontal asymptotes

analogies.analogy: Like walking down a hill blindfolded - take small steps in the direction that feels steepest downhill
